tasks.title: Log a dataset from the sim
tasks.notes: Many rollouts, randomized bank angles; save (state, action, next_state). Sim becomes the data factory. YOU ARE HERE.

tasks.title: Rung 1 — predict next state (MLP) + the keystone plot
tasks.notes: MSE (state,action)->next_state. Free-running vs teacher-forced error vs horizon = the go/no-go gate. Zero papers.

tasks.title: Add a planner (CEM/MPC) + navigate to a goal
tasks.notes: Task = reach a goal (not endurance — that's the reactive trap). Two thermals + sink between + goal past the second.

tasks.title: Compare to a reactive baseline — THE EXPERIMENT
tasks.notes: Reactive 'turn toward lift' vs the planner, same task. Does predicting beat reacting? — the organizing question as a number.

tasks.title: Randomize + evolve the world (POMDP)
tasks.notes: Randomized layouts + thermal drift/decay. Encoder gets a short memory window. Build the sensor firewall here.

tasks.title: Rung 2 — the real JEPA (latent prediction)
tasks.notes: encode->predict next latent, EMA target + stop-grad + anti-collapse. Papers read just-in-time: BYOL, I-JEPA, V-JEPA2-AC, LeWM. A tie vs rung 1 is NOT failure.

tasks.title: Dynamic soaring (shear layer)
tasks.notes: Swap thermal field for a shear layer. Committed trajectory you can't react into — the hard test of plan-through.

tasks.title: (Optional) Vision branch — add the camera
tasks.notes: Renderer + vision encoder (ViT/CNN). Does seeing the clouds beat inferring from the trail? Gated behind everything above.

tasks.title: (Optional) Real hardware — RC glider/car, inference only
tasks.notes: A second, filmable, real-physics datapoint. Training stays on the Mac. Not needed for the result.
